_doc: SRD 5.2.1 subclasses — exactly one per class is published in the SRD. Feature summaries paraphrase SRD 5.2.1 mechanics (CC-BY; see /disclaimer).

3.name: Frenzy
3.summary: While raging, bonus-action Frenzied Strike grants extra weapon attacks; gain temp HP.

6.name: Mindless Rage
6.summary: Immunity to charmed and frightened while raging.

10.name: Intimidating Presence
10.summary: Spend a rage use to frighten one creature within 30 ft (CHA save).

14.name: Retaliation
14.summary: Reaction: melee attack vs creature that damaged you within 5 ft.

3.name: Bonus Proficiencies
3.summary: Proficiency in three skills.

3.name: Cutting Words
3.summary: Reaction: spend a Bardic Inspiration die to subtract from an enemy roll.

6.name: Magical Secrets
6.summary: Learn two spells from any class.

14.name: Peerless Skill
14.summary: Spend a Bardic Inspiration die on your own d20 test.

3.name: Disciple of Life
3.summary: Healing spells of L1+ heal extra 2 + spell level.

3.name: Preserve Life
3.summary: Channel Divinity: distribute 5×level HP among creatures within 30 ft.

6.name: Blessed Healer
6.summary: Healing spells also heal you for 2 + spell level.

10.name: Supreme Healing
10.summary: Maximize healing dice on cleric spells.

17.name: Incarnation of Life
17.summary: Bonus +5 HP per cleric level; allies regen near you.

3.name: Bonus Cantrip
3.summary: Learn one extra druid cantrip.

3.name: Circle Spells
3.summary: Always-prepared spells based on chosen land.

6.name: Land's Aid
6.summary: Action: AoE healing or radiant damage.

10.name: Nature's Ward
10.summary: Immune to poisoned, charmed, frightened by elementals/fey.

14.name: Nature's Sanctuary
14.summary: Beasts/plants must save vs WIS to attack you.

3.name: Improved Critical
3.summary: Weapon attacks score crit on 19-20.

7.name: Remarkable Athlete
7.summary: Add half PB to STR/DEX/CON checks; jump farther.

18.name: Survivor
18.summary: Regen 5 + CON HP each turn while bloodied.

3.name: Open Hand Technique
3.summary: Flurry attacks can knock prone, push 15 ft, or impose disadv on next attack.

6.name: Wholeness of Body
6.summary: Heal HP equal to martial-arts die × WIS.

11.name: Fleet Step
11.summary: Bonus action: take Step of the Wind effect for free, 1/turn.

17.name: Quivering Palm
17.summary: Touch attack sets a quivering vibration; later collapse for massive necrotic damage.

3.name: Oath Spells
3.summary: Always prepared list (Protection from Evil and Good, Shield of Faith, etc.).

3.name: Sacred Weapon
3.summary: Channel Divinity: weapon adds CHA to attacks, sheds light, deals radiant.

7.name: Aura of Devotion
7.summary: Allies in aura immune to charmed.

15.name: Smite of Protection
15.summary: Half-cover bonus to allies in aura while smite is active.

20.name: Holy Nimbus
20.summary: Bright light 30 ft; foes take radiant damage; advantage on saves vs spells.

3.name: Hunter's Lore
3.summary: Hunter's Mark also reveals immunity/resistance/vulnerability.

3.name: Hunter's Prey
3.summary: Choose Colossus Slayer, Horde Breaker, or Giant Killer.

7.name: Defensive Tactics
7.summary: Choose Escape the Horde, Multiattack Defense, or Steel Will.

15.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
15.summary: Choose Evasion, Stand Against the Tide, or Uncanny Dodge.

3.name: Fast Hands
3.summary: Cunning Action also lets you Use an Object or use thieves' tools.

3.name: Second-Story Work
3.summary: Climb at full speed; running jump adds DEX in feet.

9.name: Supreme Sneak
9.summary: Spend Sneak-Attack die for advantage on next Stealth.

13.name: Use Magic Device
13.summary: Ignore class/race/level requirements on magic items.

17.name: Thief's Reflexes
17.summary: Two turns on the first round of combat.

3.name: Draconic Resilience
3.summary: +1 HP/level; AC = 10 + DEX + PB without armor.

3.name: Origin Spells
3.summary: Always-prepared list including Dragon's Breath.

6.name: Elemental Affinity
6.summary: Add CHA to one damage roll of your origin's damage type; spend 1 SP for resistance.

14.name: Dragon Wings
14.summary: Bonus action: sprout wings, fly speed = walking.

18.name: Draconic Presence
18.summary: Action + 5 SP: 60-ft aura of awe/dread, WIS save.

3.name: Fiend Spells
3.summary: Always-prepared list (Burning Hands, Command, Fireball, etc.).

3.name: Dark One's Blessing
3.summary: Reduce a foe to 0 HP: gain CHA + warlock-level temp HP.

6.name: Dark One's Own Luck
6.summary: Add 1d10 to an ability check or save; 2/short rest.

10.name: Fiendish Resilience
10.summary: Choose a damage type each rest; gain resistance.

14.name: Hurl Through Hell
14.summary: Hit a creature: send it through the lower planes for 10d10 psychic, 1/long rest.

3.name: Evocation Savant
3.summary: Half cost/time to copy evocation spells into spellbook.

3.name: Potent Cantrip
3.summary: Failed save vs your cantrip → still take half damage.

6.name: Sculpt Spells
6.summary: Pick 1 + slot-level allies in your evocation; they auto-save and take 0 damage.

10.name: Empowered Evocation
10.summary: Add INT mod to one damage roll of an evocation spell.

14.name: Overchannel
14.summary: Maximize damage of a 1st-5th level damage spell; subsequent uses cost HP.
